Body.Content:
New pay-as-you-go, consumption-based meter for additional OneDrive storage. Control which OneDrive accounts can grow beyond their licensed storage limits and give selected users more space as needed.

GA date: July CY2026

Preview date: July CY2026
Body.Markdown:

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: New pay-as-you-go, consumption-based meter for additional OneDrive storage. Control which OneDrive accounts can grow beyond their licensed storage limits and give selected users more space as needed.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)
